summary: Testing of 2 features completed: 1) Visual Upgrade Path Indicator in student detail modal, 2) Welcome email for new employees. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Upgrade Path Indicator fully functional with all components visible.

Backend: Courses API returns courses with level keywords for path visualization

Backend: Create employee with user account sends welcome email (welcome_email_sent: true)

Backend: Student response includes all upgrade-related fields
Backend: Email service configuration is operational
Frontend: Upgrade Journey section visible in student detail modal
Frontend: Progress bar shows 5 course levels (Starter, Basic, Intermediate, Advanced, Mastery)
Frontend: '8 Upgrades' badge displays correctly for test student
Frontend: Upgrade History section shows upgrade entries
Frontend: 'Next level: Basic' hint displays correctly
